channel.title: OnOptions
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from OnOptions, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Privacy Expert Reveals the Shocking Truth of What Happens to Your Personal Data When Getting Verified on LinkedIn
item.description: An online sleuth uncovers the site’s hidden link to a tech company that collects and shares all your personal data with a global network of AI partner...

item.title: A two-child household must earn $400,000 a year for childcare to be affordable, study says. ‘It’s easy to see why birth rates are falling’
item.description: “Most parents could tell you that child care costs are astronomical these days and can cause a major financial burden, even for high-income families."

item.title: 5 Science-Proven Ways to Feel Happier and Strengthen Relationships
item.description: These daily actions can boost brain happiness in no time.

item.title: How to watch the 2026 Olympics closing ceremony live
item.description: The fleeting nature of the Olympic Winter Games makes them all the more alluring. The scarcity is almost sacred. Competitors work their whole lifetime...

item.title: To protect their businesses, corporate leaders need to speak out about the events in Minnesota and beyond
item.description: Corporate leaders today are stuck between a rock and a hard place. Nobody can see events playing out in the streets in Minnesota and elsewhere and not...

item.title: Hoping for a tariff refund? Trump officials say they are waiting for lower courts to provide instructions. ‘They created the situation’
item.description: "I'm not going to get out ahead of the court. We will follow the court's direction. But as I said that could be weeks or months away.

item.title: Why AI Can’t Replace Humans in Service Businesses
item.description: The companies that win won’t be the ones that replace people but the ones that use AI to make their people exceptional.

item.title: Ben Franklin found the secret to happy aging 275 years ago. Modern psychology agrees
item.description: American statesman and polymath Ben Franklin’s legacy includes inspirational quotes on frugality, honesty, and hard work. He’s less frequently thought...

item.title: Top EU lawmaker proposes pause on U.S. trade deal ratification, citing ‘pure tariff chaos’ from Trump administration
item.description: “No one can make sense of it anymore — only open questions and growing uncertainty for the EU and other U.S. trading partners.”

item.title: Leaders, It’s Time to Rethink Setting Boundaries in Your Business
item.description: Boundaries keep unwanted requests away, while safeguarding your energy and focus.

item.title: Older adults are heading back to school and represent the ‘new majority student’ as they seek up-skilling or a career change
item.description: “I think this is tied to access. Many of our learners, not all of them, haven’t imagined themselves in any kind of higher education, post-secondary ed...

item.title: TSA says PreCheck is still operational, right after DHS head Kristi Noem said it was suspended due to government shutdown
item.description: It was not immediately clear whether Global Entry, another airport service, would be affected.

item.title: Why the greatest risk of AI in higher education is the erosion of learning
item.description: Public debate about artificial intelligence in higher education has largely orbited a familiar worry: cheating . Will students use chatbots to write e...

item.title: AI can tank teams’ critical thinking skills. Here’s how to protect yours
item.description: AI is transforming how teams work. But it’s not just the tools that matter. It’s what happens to thinking when those tools do the heavy lifting, and w...

item.title: How to Empower Employees to Deliver ‘Wow’ Customer Service Moments
item.description: Nothing creates emotional connection faster than a story worth retelling.
